evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: precisione e stress tolerance nel rispetto delle scadenze
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD is dominated by rigour signals — 'garantendone l'accuratezza e la pertinenza', 'competenza metodica', 'precisione' — with no velocity phrases present.
evidence.domain_risk: soluzioni di visualizzazione dei dati per iniziative basate su progetti o come servizio per i clienti
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: BIP is a consulting firm serving multiple sectors; the JD contains no explicit financial/regulatory/compliance language, so domain_risk is moderate rather than high.
evidence.collaboration_width: Data Scientist; esperti di Data Governance; Data Architect; Project Manager
evidence.data_team_maturity: guidare e coordinare junior analyst all'interno dei team di progetto
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named specialist roles (Data Scientist, Data Architect, Data Governance) and junior analyst coordination signal a functioning, growing data practice — consistent with mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Svilupperai sistemi di analisi delle performance, report interattivi e dashboard analitici utilizzando gli strumenti Looker e Google GCP
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tool references (Looker, GCP, BigQuery, stored procedures) give technical precision in some bullets, but soft-skill and generic consulting boilerplate ('ottime doti relazionali', 'collaborare con vendor') pull it to mixed.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: dimostrare e costruire relazioni con i clienti; modellazione dei dati e implementazione di servizi di progettazione dei dati
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Client-facing delivery ('costruire relazioni con i clienti') and internal data modelling responsibilities carry genuinely equal weight in a consulting context, yielding mixed.
evidence.autonomy_level: guidare e coordinare junior analyst; riassumere analisi complesse condotte da altri esperti
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role leads junior analysts (strategic) but also summarises work conducted by senior experts (execution), making this a genuine mixed autonomy profile.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: analisi e lo sviluppo di soluzioni di visualizzazione dei dati per iniziative basate su progetti o come servizio
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Consulting project work spans both new builds and extensions of existing client systems, with no dominant greenfield or fix signal.
evidence.language_gate: Conoscenza fluente di italiano e inglese

ai_role_quote: Looker, Google GCP, BigQuery, stored procedures
ai_role_reasoning: No AI coding tools or GenAI infrastructure mentioned; traditional BI and analytics stack only.
testing_framing_reasoning: Individual precision and accuracy emphasized, but no ownership of testing practices, quality frameworks, or data contracts.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Delivery and project outcome focus with no compliance, regulatory, or operational reliability risk language.
